channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Potholes/hokes in surfaces, 3rd April
item.description:
The safety surfacing is in a poor state of repair as is the wooden surface on the bridge by the zip wire. Some of the play equipment is also in disrepair which is unsafe for most children but specifically for sight impaired children.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light outside Kossoff’s bakery, 3rd April
item.description:
The traffic light crossing button outside kossoffs bakery on Kentish town road does not function, this forces pedestrians to have to cross whilst traffic is going as the light will not change to red.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 309-311, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 31 Manister Road: plastic boxes and crates., 3rd April
item.description:
Boxes and crates are near to flats opposite 31 Manister Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manister Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike locked against metal gate bars, 3rd April
item.description:
Abandoned bike with locked with bike lock- outside 18 marcia road, london, se1 5xf

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marcia Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged scooter dumped, 3rd April
item.description:
Kids dumped scooter attracting groups of youths
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165, Lower Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Coronation court, 3rd April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: St Gabriel’s road and Exeter, 3rd April
item.description:
Household items left on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Exeter Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Litterpick of 6, 3rd April
item.description:
Bags Inc 3 recycling left in usual place at Bricklayers arms roundabout. Done by volunteers

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bricklayers Arms, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Housewood equipments, 3rd April
item.description:
The housewood waste make a problem for resident and car parking so please remove these all equipments.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Scott Lidgett Crescent, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All along Lynton road between brondesbury and Victoria, 3rd April
item.description:
Street seems to never get sweeped. Litter and discarded drink cans, plastic ties / straps, old shoes, aluminium cans. Same pieces of litter are there week after week without sweeping away.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlights doesn't work, 3rd April
item.description:
There are 2X streetlight on Olive grove, both of them is not working. I've been reported this problem to the council a year ago, but wasn't fixed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Olive Grove, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple waste bags stored illegally, 3rd April
item.description:
Uncontrolled waste very likely from nearby works that are commonly known to be uncontrolled and dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regal Alley, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress flytipped on street, 3rd April
item.description:
A double mattress has been left on the street. Please can it be removed? Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car, 3rd April
item.description:
Car has been abandoned for years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Anerley Grove, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The whole surface is cratered, 3rd April
item.description:
The majority of the southbound carriageway is pot holed. So much so it’s a danger to 2 wheeled vehicles and only a matter of time before someone is seriously hurt or worse. This needs fixing with some urgency.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Goswell Road, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 3rd April
item.description:
Car has been abandoned for years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Anerley Grove, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 6 foot long pothole, 3rd April
item.description:
Huge pothole 6 foot long by 3 foot wide down the centre oh the road!!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 121, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: High amount of rubbish next to the commercial bin, 3rd April
item.description:
High amount of rubbish next to the commercial bin
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Road, Edmonton

item.title: 5 bags dumped rubbish, 3rd April
item.description:
Over 5 bags dumped full of household waste
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole outside of 15 Hampden Road, 3rd April
item.description:
Large pothole has been getting worse and worse and feels dangerous to park on. Big chunks of the road are coming away:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hampden Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
